product.name: SaniteModar Linear Shower Drain, Linear Drain 24 inch Invisible 2 in 1 Tile Insert and Flat Cover, Brushed 304 Stainless Steel Shower Drain with Hair Strainer Adjustable Leveling Feet
features: Linear Shower Drain Specification: Drain Size: 24 x 2.8 x 2.5" The diameter of outlet is 2",high displacement with an average of 60 l/min without filter mesh
Shower Drain Material: Linear Drain is made of high quality AISI 304 stainless steel,the special production technology to prevent corrosion and rust

Shower Drain 24 inch Specification Design: The internal x-shaped design ensures that water flows quickly to the central drain, reducing residual moisture at the bottom. It can be used in bathrooms, kitchens and other areas

Easy to Install and Clean: Shower Drain comes with two adjustable feet ,It can solve the installation problem effectively caused by the unevenness of the ground.After using for a period of time, open the panel of linear shower drain and take the filter mesh out. Washing the filter mesh with water
